query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as total, 
  SUM(CASE WHEN role = 'admin' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as admins,
  SUM(CASE WHEN role = 'gestor' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as gestores,
  SUM(CASE WHEN role = 'corretor' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as corretores
FROM users;
